backstory.original: With an unexpected Celestial and magical heritage, Virgil Zoar was always traveling to get away from both his past and a disapproving family. He put his talents to work on the sea, traveling with crews who he hoped would ask nothing more than that he earn his keep by way of his Storm sorcery. One day, tired of wandering, he ended up in the quiet lakeside town of Caradoon, thinking he might put down roots. But that all changed when he met and fell for a kindred spirit in the form of a charming and witty tiefling named Kent. After some over-enthusiastic handling of the local tavern's rat problem, they found themselves on the move again, met up with Selise Astorio of the Rivals of Waterdeep, becoming quickly entangled in the group's adventures, and realizing that they had found a new family and a new home.
backstory.display: 意外获得天界与魔法传承的维吉尔·佐尔总是四处旅行，以摆脱过去和不认同他的家庭。他将自己的才能投入大海，与船员一起旅行，希望他们只会要求他借助风暴魔法来谋生。终有一天，厌倦流浪的他来到了宁静的湖边小镇卡拉敦，考虑在这里扎根。然而，当他遇到一位名叫肯特的迷人而幽默的提夫林，并喜欢上他的时候，一切都改变了。过度热情地解决当地酒馆的老鼠问题之后，他们发现自己再度踏上旅程，并遇到了深水城的竞争对手赛丽斯·阿斯托里奥。很快加入了团队冒险的他们意识到，自己找到了新的家庭和家人。

description.original: Virgil fires 3 magic missiles at random targets.
description.display: 维吉尔向随机目标发射 3 发魔法飞弹。

description.original: Virgil attacks a random enemy with lightning, chaining up to 20 times. Weather changes to thunder.
description.display: 维吉尔用闪电攻击一名随机敌人，最多弹射 20 次。天气改变为“闪电”。

longDescription.original: Virgil attacks a random enemy with a bolt of lightning dealing ultimate damage. Every 0.2 seconds, the lightning bolt attacks another random enemy until 20 enemies are struck or no enemies remain. In addition, the area's weather changes to thunder.
longDescription.display: 维吉尔用一道闪电对一名随机敌人造成杀招伤害。每隔 0.2 秒，闪电束会额外攻击随机敌人，直到击中 20 名敌人或没有敌人存在。此外，区域天气改变为“闪电”。

description.original: Virgil buffs the Champions adjacent to him by increasing their damage and decreasing their attack cooldown.
description.display: 维吉尔提高相邻勇士的伤害，并缩短其攻击冷却时间，从而增强他们的实力。

description.original: Virgil increases the damage of all Champions based on how many times the weather has changed.
description.display: 维吉尔根据天气变化的次数提高所有勇士的伤害。

description.desc: If Kent qualifies for an adventure restriction based on his tags, age, ability scores, etc., Virgil may be used as well.
如果肯特的标签、年龄、技能分数等符合冒险的资格要求，则维吉尔也可以一并出场。
Virgil increases the damage of all adjacent Champions by $(amount)%, and decreases their normal attack speed cooldown by $(seconds_plural amount___2)

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Reduces the cooldown on $target's Base Attack by $(seconds_plural amount)

description.desc: 维吉尔使所有相邻勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，并使其普通攻击速度的冷却时间缩短 $(seconds_plural amount___2) 秒

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 使$target的基本攻击冷却时间缩短 $(seconds_plural amount) 秒

tipText.original: Virgil buffs the Champions adjacent to him by increasing their damage and decreasing their attack cooldown.
tipText.display: 维吉尔提高相邻勇士的伤害，并缩短其攻击冷却时间，从而增强他们的实力。

description.pre: Virgil gains a Weather stack each time the weather changes when advancing to a new area or when it's changed by an ultimate attack or other ability. Virgil tracks each type of weather in a separate stack. Each stack is multiplied by $(stack_mult_percent)% and then all stacks are multiplied together to get a total value which increases the damage of all Champions. Each stack caps at $(max_stacks_per_weather_type).
当前进到一个新区域，或被杀招攻击或其他技能改变天气时，每次天气变化都会使维吉尔获得一层“天气”堆叠。维吉尔单独堆叠每种类型的天气。每层堆叠均乘以 $(stack_mult_percent)%，然后将所有堆叠相乘，得到一个总值，从而提高所有勇士的伤害。每种堆叠的上限为 $(max_stacks_per_weather_type)。

tipText.original: Virgil increases the damage of all Champions based on how many times the weather has changed.
tipText.display: 维吉尔根据天气变化的次数提高所有勇士的伤害。

description.pre: Enemies that are defeated within $(seconds_plural optional_within_time) of being on screen have a $(not_buffed amount)% chance to drop double quest items or count for double quest progress for each Rivals of Waterdeep Champion in the formation, stacking additively.

effect_keys.stack_title: Rivals of Waterdeep Champions in formation

description.pre: 阵型中的每个“深水城的竞争对手”勇士都会使在屏幕中出现 $(seconds_plural optional_within_time) 内被击败的敌人有 $(not_buffed amount)% 几率掉落双倍任务物品，或者计算双倍任务进度，以加算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 阵型中的“深水城的竞争对手”勇士

description.desc: Virgil's magic missile and chain lightning attacks turn green, and he further increases Storm Sorcerer's damage boost by 100% and increases the attack cooldown reduction by a further 1 second.
维吉尔的魔法飞弹和连环闪电攻击变成绿色，使他的“风暴术士”伤害进一步提高 100%，并且攻击冷却时间进一步减少 1 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Virgil feels relaxed, increasing the effect of Storm Sorcerer.
specializationDescription.display: 维吉尔感到放松，风暴术士的效果提高。

description.desc: Virgil gains the Control role and his magic missile and chain lightning attacks turn amber, he increases the number of magic missiles he fires by one, and there is a 25% chance he stuns an enemy struck by a magic missile for 5 seconds.
维吉尔获得控制者角色，他的魔法飞弹和连环闪电攻击变成琥珀色，使其发射的魔法飞弹数量增加一个，并且有 25% 几率使被魔法飞弹击中的敌人眩晕 5 秒。

specializationDescription.original: Virgil feels anxious, improving his Magic Missile attack.
specializationDescription.display: 维吉尔感到焦虑，强化魔法飞弹攻击。

description.desc: Virgil's magic missile and chain lightning attacks turn violet, and Virgil increases Weather Control's damage boost by 33% for each Rivals of Waterdeep Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
维吉尔的魔法飞弹和连环闪电攻击变成紫色。阵型中的每个“深水城的竞争对手”勇士均使维吉尔的“控制天气”伤害提高 33%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Virgil feels determined, boosting the damage of Weather Control for each Rivals of Waterdeep Champion.
specializationDescription.display: 维吉尔感到坚定，阵型中每位“深水城的竞争对手”勇士均使“控制天气”的伤害提高。

description.pre: While a Champion in the formation is knocked out, Virgil's magic missile and chain lightning attacks turn red and any enemy he hits with his base attack takes an additional $(amount)% damage for the next $(total_seconds) seconds. If an enemy is hit again, the timer is reset but doesn't otherwise stack.
当阵型中的一名勇士被击倒时，维吉尔的魔法飞弹和连环闪电攻击会变红，并且他使用基本攻击命中的任何敌人，都会在接下来的 $(total_seconds) 秒内额外受到 $(amount)% 的伤害。如果敌人再次被击中，计时会重置，但不会堆叠。

description.original: This is what heroes do, isn't it?
description.display: 英雄就该这样做，不是吗？

description.original: Why don't we try to talk this out?
description.display: 我们为什么不试着坦诚交流？

description.original: Follow me -- I'm easy to spot.
description.display: 跟我走--我的目标很明显。

description.original: The storm is at my fingertips.
description.display: 风暴就在我指尖。

description.original: This is why you want a storm sorcerer on your side!
description.display: 这就是为什么你需要一个风暴术士同伴！

description.original: Scorched earth is a path.
description.display: 焦土是一条通路。

description.original: I hope you prepared for what's about to hit you.
description.display: 我希望你为即将发生的事情做好准备。

description.original: The skies are mine.
description.display: 天空属于我。

description.original: Kent if you say "and heart," I swear.
description.display: 肯特，如果你敢说“芳心大师”，我发誓......

description.original: This is how you clear the field.
description.display: 这就是清理战场的方法。

description.original: You roll with the waves, you get some excellent definition.
description.display: 放平心态能让你获得完美的体型。

description.original: Kent, please don't say 'Roll Out' - no one knows what that means.
description.display: 肯特，拜托别说“出动”了——没人懂的。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% for each Rivals of Waterdeep Champion in the formation

description.original: Why would I say 'morphing' in the middle of that, Kent? That doesn't make sense.
description.display: 我为什么要在那个中间说“变形”，肯特？这说不通啊。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% for each Rivals of Waterdeep Champion in the formation

description.original: Allow me to fan the flames a bit.
description.display: 请允许我给火上浇点油。

description.original: There's nothing wrong with being a little extra.
description.display: 多多益善。

description.original: We're all in this together! ...No, Kent, I'm not singing.
description.display: 我们都是一条船上的人！……不，肯特，我不是在唱歌。

effects._description: FEAT_2356_EFFECTS_0_DESC|Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

character_sheet_details.backstory: With an unexpected Celestial and magical heritage, Virgil Zoar was always traveling to get away from both his past and a disapproving family. He put his talents to work on the sea, traveling with crews who he hoped would ask nothing more than that he earn his keep by way of his Storm sorcery. One day, tired of wandering, he ended up in the quiet lakeside town of Caradoon, thinking he might put down roots. But that all changed when he met and fell for a kindred spirit in the form of a charming and witty tiefling named Kent. After some over-enthusiastic handling of the local tavern's rat problem, they found themselves on the move again, met up with Selise Astorio of the Rivals of Waterdeep, becoming quickly entangled in the group's adventures, and realizing that they had found a new family and a new home.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Virgil is a Support and Speed Champion who boosts damage based on the changing weather

event_upgrades.name: Weather Control

character_sheet_details.system_description: 维吉尔是一名支援和速度型勇士，可根据天气变化提高伤害
